# The Robot Age

> Robotic literacy education and certification for non-engineers.

The Robot Age is an education platform that builds robotic literacy for designers, strategists, healthcare professionals, and business leaders — people who work alongside robots but don't build them.

## What we offer

- **Robotic literacy curriculum** — Structured learning for non-engineers entering robotic environments
- **REP Certification** — Robotics Experience Practitioner, the foundational credential for anyone shaping the human side of robotics
- **Research & Insights** — Original research and critical perspectives on human-robot interaction
- **The Robot Age Summit** — Annual gathering for designers and leaders shaping human-robot experience
- **Enterprise programs** — Deployment readiness education for organizations integrating robots

## Key pages

- /robotic-literacy — What robotic literacy is and why it matters
- /learn — Full curriculum and certification tracks
- /research — Articles and field observations
- /summit — Annual summit information
- /enterprise — Organizational programs
- /access — Waitlist for the REP certification
